core_principle: Player growth improves survivability, options, efficiency, and depth access, but must not remove risk, adaptation, or residue consequences.

allowed_growth_vectors.description: Incremental increases to health, damage, defense, speed, or recovery.
New active/passive abilities that expand play options.
Loot-based improvement through rarity, affixes, relics, and crafting.
Persistent refinement of playstyle identity without absolute invulnerability.
Player-facing and system-facing familiarity with floor behavior, hidden marks, and mutation patterns.

residue_pressure_checks.description: Repeated dominant strategies become visible to tower adaptation.
High-output abilities may increase deviation or mutation pressure.
Excessive reliance on one damage type, skill, or tactic becomes eligible mutation input.
Progression should help the player survive deeper floors, not erase threat.
